name: acu-star-database-iii
description: SP·数据库 VII (AutoCardUpdater) - SillyTavern 数据库自动更新脚本

scripts.build: rollup -c && node scripts/fix-generated-whitespace.mjs && node scripts/sync-userscript-json.mjs && node scripts/check-arch.mjs
scripts.build:concat: node scripts/run-rollup.mjs concat && node scripts/fix-generated-whitespace.mjs && node scripts/sync-userscript-json.mjs
scripts.build:all: node scripts/run-rollup.mjs all && node scripts/fix-generated-whitespace.mjs && node scripts/sync-userscript-json.mjs dist/index.bundle.js
